title: [IEC62304-5.1.1] software-development-plan
description:
Rule: IEC62304-5.1.1
Severity: info
Count: 1 finding(s)
Standard: IEC 62304
Clause: 5.1.1
Category: documentation

software-development-plan: A Software Development Plan must be established and maintained

Remediation: Create and maintain a Software Development Plan covering lifecycle activities, deliverables, and traceability

acceptance_criteria: • sentrik gate passes with no critical/high findings
